responses.question: In a typical week, what is the total number of hours you work across all your roles combined?
How many hours per week do you spend face-to-face (or on calls) with customers — across presales and delivery?
What are the main activities that make up your customer-facing time?
responses.answer:
Project meetings
Stakeholder check-ins
Risk assessment and mitigation
Executive business reviews and QBRs
Suggest best practices

responses.question: How many hours per week do you typically spend on your Delivery Partner responsibilities?
In your Delivery Partner role, what are the top 3 activities where you spend most of your time and feel you add real value?
responses.answer:
Stakeholder alignment — maintaining regular connects so stakeholders know who to reach and have confidence in delivery oversight
Addressing delivery concerns — identifying and resolving risks before they escalate
Driving delivery improvements — identifying patterns across projects and enabling teams to course-correct proactively

responses.question: Still in your Delivery Partner role — what are 2 activities you regularly have to do, but feel are low-value or unproductive?
responses.answer: Being pulled into routine project activities that PMs or Tech Leads should own independently

responses.question: How many hours per week do you typically spend on your Cloud Leader responsibilities?
In your Cloud Leader role, what are the top 3 activities where you spend most of your time and feel you add real value?
responses.answer:
Capability development — building team skills across AI, Agentforce, and new features/ product capabilities
Project risk assessment and mitigation
Staying current on AI trends, product roadmap, best practices, organisational updates and translating them into team capability and delivery strategy

responses.question: Still in your Cloud Leader role — what are 2 activities you regularly have to do, but feel are low-value or unproductive?
responses.answer: Coordinating logistics and relaying information that could be delegated to team leads

responses.question: What is the single biggest thing that prevents you from spending time on what matters most in your role?
responses.answer: Clarity of the roles/responsibilities - not everything can be documented but leaders needs to use their judgement and take charge. Ensuring every team member has the clarity, capability, and confidence to act independently.

responses.question: If you could redesign your week, what would you spend significantly more time on — and what would you hand off or stop doing?
responses.answer: Increased focus on strategic business leadership — spending more time on stakeholder relationship management and hunting for opportunities to grow individual and team brand. Invest more in pipeline partnerships, AI-led practice building, and developing consultants and managers who run delivery autonomously. Stop being the escalation point for project-level issues.
